mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO party_cycle_member_payment ( party_cycle_id, party_id, party_member_id, user_id, amount, status, idempotency_key, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{partyCycleId}, #{partyId}, #{partyMemberId}, #{userId}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE party_cycle_member_payment SET status = 'PAID', external_tx_id = #{externalTxId}, paid_at = #{paidAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE party_cycle_id = #{partyCycleId} AND party_member_id = #{partyMemberId} AND status = 'PROCESSING'

UPDATE party_cycle_member_payment SET status = 'FAILED', failure_reason = #{failureReason}, failure_code = #{failureCode}, failed_at = #{failedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE party_cycle_id = #{partyCycleId} AND party_member_id = #{partyMemberId} AND status = 'PROCESSING'

UPDATE party_cycle_member_payment SET status = 'FAILED', failure_reason = #{failureReason}, failure_code = #{failureCode}, failed_at = #{failedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE party_cycle_id = #{partyCycleId} AND status IN ('PAYMENT_PENDING', 'PROCESSING')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM party_cycle_member_payment WHERE party_cycle_id = #{partyCycleId} AND status NOT IN ('PAID', 'CANCELLED')
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM party_cycle_member_payment WHERE party_cycle_id = #{partyCycleId} AND status IN ('PAYMENT_PENDING', 'PROCESSING')

SELECT DISTINCT pcmp.party_cycle_id FROM party_cycle_member_payment pcmp INNER JOIN party_cycle pc ON pc.id = pcmp.party_cycle_id WHERE pc.status IN ('PAYMENT_PENDING', 'PROCESSING') AND pc.billing_due_at < #{deadline} AND pcmp.status IN ('PAYMENT_PENDING', 'PROCESSING')
mapper.update: UPDATE party_cycle_member_payment SET status = 'PAYMENT_PENDING', failure_reason = NULL, failure_code = NULL, failed_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE party_cycle_id = #{partyCycleId} AND status = 'FAILED'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM party_cycle_member_payment WHERE party_cycle_id = #{partyCycleId} ORDER BY id ASC
